unexpected_finds.subject: Dual-witness pattern works without explicit dispatch: W2 ratified+amended CLI reconciliation via freeform paste
unexpected_finds.context: PROMPT 199 was freeform-consult; CLI agent provided god's-eye view as intermediate reconciliation; W2 responded by ratifying-with-amendments via freeform paste. The 3-witness chain (W1 -> CLI -> W2) effectively produced dual-witness epistemic discipline without structured PROMPT-N dispatch.
unexpected_finds.candidate_memory_fact: FREEFORM-CONSULT supports n-witness chains (W1 -> CLI agent reconciliation -> W2 ratify-with-amendments) when each layer adds explicit refinement labels (e.g., R1/R2/R3 then W2-AMEND-1..N); produces dual-witness epistemic robustness without structured PROMPT-N dispatch overhead

unexpected_finds.subject: PCF-result Lean formalization candidate set
unexpected_finds.context: W2-AMEND-1 names three candidate scopes for PCF-program Lean credentialing: d=2 discriminant predicate (highest leverage / smallest scope / most concrete); BT formal-level theorem at d in [2,8] (high difficulty / high impact); or smaller PCF lemma (warm-up).
unexpected_finds.structural_insight: Lean credentialing for PCF program is currently zero-scope; even a small lemma in Lean would be unique credibility signal. d=2 discriminant predicate is the most natural starting point.
unexpected_finds.operator_action: L2 checkpoint 2026-06-15: add 'begin PCF-result Lean scoping' agenda item.

unexpected_finds.subject: Cutoff-date forcing function pattern as discipline against perpetual cascade absorption
unexpected_finds.context: W2-AMEND-2 introduces the cutoff-date pattern: set a hard date beyond which no new closed results fold into a planned publication regardless of what lands.
unexpected_finds.structural_insight: Pattern generalizes beyond Move 1 flagship to any long-cycle deliverable at risk of perpetual absorption (umbrella revisions, methodology paper, Painleve standalone).
unexpected_finds.candidate_memory_fact: Long-cycle publication deliverables at risk of perpetual cascade absorption must have explicit scope-and-cutoff-date agreement set BEFORE drafting begins; otherwise the deliverable absorbs every new cascade output and never ships (provenance-engineering-as-substitute-for-publication failure mode); post-cutoff results land as v2/addendum/next paper

unexpected_finds.subject: Zeilberger-first outreach has direct BT-baseline citation hook making the letter near-self-writing
unexpected_finds.context: W2-AMEND-3: Wimp-Zeilberger 1985 is load-bearing in BT-baseline note. Outreach letter can point to a paragraph in BT-baseline that builds on his 1985 result.

unexpected_finds.subject: Special-session-invitation vs contributed-talk asymmetry generalizes across conference channels
unexpected_finds.context: W2-AMEND-4 pattern applies to all conferences with special-session structure (JMM, OPSFA, Painleve biennial, ICM satellite meetings).

unexpected_finds.subject: V_quad / PIII Item 11 mid-flight (Nonlinearity 20d elapsed) creates withdraw-vs-wait operator decision
unexpected_finds.context: W2-AMEND-5 flags Item 11 'almost certainly better folded into Move 2' but currently in flight. At 20 days elapsed without verdict, modal outcome is either in-formal-review (escaped desk reject) or stalled-without-update; both argue for letting it run another 2-4 weeks.
unexpected_finds.operator_action: Set Item 11 withdraw-or-wait decision deadline at 2026-06-01 (40 days elapsed total); pull at deadline if no verdict.
